voices.name: Grandma
voices.message: My sweet Nana, you are the light of our family.

voices.name: Antydupe
voices.message: Nana! You're such a beautiful soul. Never change who you are.

one.message: Before the world knew your name, you were already shaping ours.

photos.caption: A tiny spark that would become a whole fire.
The same smile, the same heart — just taller now.

two.title: Your People
two.subtitle: The ones who see you completely.

timeline.title: The Anchor
timeline.description: My sweet Nana, you are the greatest gift life ever gave me.

timeline.title: The Protector
timeline.description: I'll always be here — to protect you, to annoy you, to love you. That's what big brothers do. Forever and always.

timeline.title: The Partner-in-Crime
timeline.description: Nana, you're not just my sister – you're my friend. Life's way more fun with you in it.

timeline.title: The Wise One
timeline.description: My dear child, you have a light inside you that can never be dimmed. Shine bright, always.

timeline.title: The Loving Aunt
timeline.description: Nana! You're such a special soul. The world is better because you're in it.

letter: Sixteen years. That's how long the world has been lucky enough to have you.
You are my reminder that goodness exists, that laughter heals, and that growing up doesn't mean losing your spark.
With all the love a big brother can hold,
three.finalSurprise: Look under your pillow. There's a little something waiting for the birthday girl.
